test.details: 120 tests passed (59 shared + 61 API) across 3 packages

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove or update references to vitest's `--testPathPattern` flag. In vitest 4.x, this flag is not supported. Workers should use filename arguments directly (e.g., `vitest run test/products.test.ts`) or the `-t` flag for test name filtering instead.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature product-crud-endpoints worker noted in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges that vitest 4.x does not support --testPathPattern.
